data.name: SettingLogDetail
data.value: Set verbosity level to infinity (i.e. log all messages, useful for debugging)

data.name: OptionalPromptParamsDesc
data.value: {{$lang}}：replace by current language {{$user}}：replace by username {{$char}}：replace by character name

data.name: GPULayerTips
data.value: number of layers to store in VRAM

data.name: ContextSizeTips
data.value: size of the prompt context (default: 0, 0 = loaded from model)

data.name: LocalModelParamsSettingTips
data.value: The settings for the local model only apply to models running on this device and do not impact models accessed remotely through API calls.

data.name: MemoryIndexUpdating
data.value: Memory index is updating. Please wait...

data.name: MemoryIndexNeedUpdate
data.value: Memory sources changed. Update the index before the new content can be retrieved. Chats will keep using the previous index until then.

data.name: MemoryIndexReady
data.value: Memory index is up to date.

data.name: MemoryIndexNotBuilt
data.value: Memory index has not been built yet. Update the index before this memory can be retrieved.

data.name: MemoryIndexEmbeddingServerUnavailable
data.value: Embedding server is unavailable. Please check the local embedding model and llama.cpp server settings.

data.name: MemoryIndexEmbeddingServerTimeout
data.value: Embedding server startup timed out. Please check that the embedding model exists, or try again later.

data.name: MemoryManualTextHint
data.value: Add focused notes, facts, or instructions that should be available during retrieval.

data.name: MemoryTextFilesHint
data.value: Files are validated by content and encoding before they are added. Binary documents are not supported.

data.name: MemoryTextEditorHint
data.value: Use a clear title and keep each entry focused on one topic for better retrieval quality.

data.name: MemoryTextContentPlaceholder
data.value: Enter the knowledge that should be indexed...

data.name: MemoryIndexCancelledOldIndexKept
data.value: Update stopped. The previous index is still available.

data.name: MemorySourceEncodingUnknown
data.value: The file encoding could not be detected reliably.

data.name: MemorySourceNotPlainText
data.value: The selected file is not a valid plain text file.

data.name: MemorySourceReadFailed
data.value: The file could not be read.

data.name: MemorySourceUnsupported
data.value: This memory source type is not supported.

data.name: MemorySourceValidationFailed
data.value: One or more sources could not be validated. The previous index was kept.

data.name: MemoryImportCancelled
data.value: File import was stopped. No partial batch was added.

data.name: ChatSessionMemoryFileUploadTips
data.value: Memory is empty! Do you want to create a new memory for this chat session?

data.name: CheckAppUpdateDesc
data.value: Automatically checks GitHub releases and downloads the matching package when a new version is available.

data.name: ApplicationUpdateAlreadyLatest
data.value: You are using the latest version.

data.name: ApplicationUpdateAutoCheckPending
data.value: Automatic update check has not completed yet.

data.name: ApplicationUpdateDownloadDesc
data.value: The package is downloaded to the application data folder. After download, use Install to open it.

data.name: ApplicationUpdateNoAsset
data.value: No downloadable package matching this device was found. Please use the release page.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteApplicationUpdate
data.value: Delete this downloaded application update package?

data.name: ApplicationUpdateInstallConfirm
data.value: The update package will be extracted, then the downloaded zip will be deleted. Continue?

data.name: ApplicationUpdateInstallFileMissing
data.value: The downloaded update package no longer exists.

data.name: ApplicationUpdateInstallPackageDeleted
data.value: The update package was extracted and the downloaded archive was deleted.

data.name: ApplicationUpdateExtractFailed
data.value: Failed to extract the update package.

data.name: SettingLogLevelDesc
data.value: Control how much runtime log output is recorded.

data.name: FullscreenGameInputSupportDesc
data.value: Request administrator permission on Windows startup to improve shortcut listening and input simulation in fullscreen or administrator games.

data.name: FullscreenGameInputRestartConfirm
data.value: This setting takes effect after restart. Restart UiharuMind now?

data.name: AboutIntroductionText
data.value: UiharuMind is a cross-platform open-source app for running local GGUF large language models and calling online models. It supports Windows and macOS, and provides chat, knowledge-base conversations, screenshots, AI translation, AI OCR, clipboard history, and other quick tools.

data.name: AboutDefaultIconCredit
data.value: Default character icons are generated by Zhipu CogView4.

data.name: ShortcutQuickAutoClickDesc
data.value: Open or stop the auto click tool.

data.name: AutoClickDiscardUnsavedConfirm
data.value: The current session has unsaved changes. Discard them?

data.name: AutoClickNoStepSelected
data.value: Select a step to edit its parameters.

data.name: AutoClickEmptyTimelineDesc
data.value: Record your actions or add steps manually.

data.name: AutoClickRepeatCountHint
data.value: Repeat 0 means infinite playback until stopped.

data.name: AutoClickRecordMouseMovementOnlyWhenPressed
data.value: Only while mouse button is pressed

data.name: AutoClickRecordMouseMovementHint
data.value: Experimental. Disabled by default because raw cursor paths can replay unevenly across apps, displays, and input backends.

data.name: AutoClickLoopHint
data.value: When a loop is selected, newly added steps are inserted into that loop.

data.name: KeySelectionShortcutInstruction
data.value: Press the shortcut you want to use. Press Esc to cancel.

data.name: KeySelectionSingleInstruction
data.value: Press the key you want to add. Press Esc to cancel.

data.name: ChatWorkspaceEmpty
data.value: Select or create a chat session

data.name: CharacterWorkspaceHint
data.value: Manage roleplay characters and tool assistants

data.name: CharacterLibraryHint
data.value: Choose a character to preview, edit, or start chatting.

data.name: CharacterEditorHint
data.value: Edit identity, prompts, mounted tools, and generation parameters.

data.name: ImportFileHint
data.value: Select a compatible character card file and import it into the local library.

data.name: ImportUrlDisabledTitle
data.value: URL import is not available yet

data.name: ImportUrlDisabledHint
data.value: This entry is reserved for future online character-card imports. Use local JSON import for now.

data.name: UserCardEditorHint
data.value: Adjust your displayed identity and user prompt template.

data.name: ChatSelectSessionWarning
data.value: Please select a chat session first.

data.name: ChatGenerationInProgressWarning
data.value: A response is already being generated.

data.name: ChatModelRequiredWarning
data.value: No model is active. Enable a model before starting a conversation.

data.name: MemoryIndexDimensionMismatch
data.value: The embedding model dimension does not match the existing index. Rebuild the memory index.

data.name: MemoryLibraryHint
data.value: Choose the background, relationships, and world knowledge this character should remember.

data.name: MemoryRoleUsageHint
data.value: Relevant passages are recalled during the conversation and supplied to the character as private context.

data.name: MemoryLibraryEmptyHint
data.value: Select a memory on the left, or create one for this character.

data.name: MemoryDeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete this memory library? Its sources and local index will no longer be available.

data.name: MemoryCreateHint
data.value: Give this memory a clear identity so it can be reused across compatible characters.

data.name: MemoryNamePlaceholder
data.value: For example: Misaka Mikoto · Academy City

data.name: MemoryNameHint
data.value: Use a short name that is easy to recognize in the character selector.

data.name: MemoryDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the character, relationship, setting, or story arc covered by this memory.

data.name: MemoryIndexRoleHint
data.value: Keep facts focused and explicit. Separate identities, relationships, events, and world rules into readable sources.

data.name: MemoryIndexSafeUpdateHint
data.value: The previous index remains usable until the new one is completely built.

data.name: MemoryEditorFooterHint
data.value: Source changes become searchable after updating the index.

data.name: MemoryManualTextRoleHint
data.value: Write character facts, relationships, important events, dialogue rules, and world lore.

data.name: MemoryManualTextEmptyHint
data.value: Add a focused note for identity, relationships, history, or world knowledge.

data.name: MemoryTextFilesRoleHint
data.value: Import scripts, lore sheets, profiles, or other detected plain-text references.

data.name: MemoryTextFilesEmptyHint
data.value: Add a text-based character profile, story summary, script, or world guide.

data.name: MemoryTextEditorRoleHint
data.value: Shape one focused piece of long-term context for the character.

data.name: MemoryTextWritingGuideHint
data.value: Clear, factual notes are easier to recall than long conversational prose.

data.name: MemoryTextGuideIdentityHint
data.value: Names, traits, habits, abilities, and boundaries.

data.name: MemoryTextGuideRelationshipHint
data.value: How people address, trust, remember, and react to one another.

data.name: MemoryTextGuideWorldHint
data.value: Locations, timelines, rules, shared history, and unresolved events.

data.name: MemoryTextIndexHint
data.value: After saving, return to the memory workspace and update the index.

data.name: MemoryTextSaveHint
data.value: Saving marks the memory index as needing an update.

data.name: MemoryNameInvalid
data.value: The name contains characters that cannot be used in a local memory file.

data.name: MemoryIndexEmbeddingInputTooLarge
data.value: A passage is still too large for the embedding model after automatic splitting. Shorten that source and try again.

data.name: MemoryIndexCancelHint
data.value: Click Stop update to cancel. The previous index remains available.

data.name: MemoryIndexUpdatingDetail
data.value: A new searchable index is being built. Existing conversations can continue using the previous version.

data.name: MemoryIndexReadyDetail
data.value: All current sources are available for character recall.

data.name: MemoryIndexEmbeddingRequestFailed
data.value: The embedding service could not process the request. Check that the embedding model is running, then retry the index update.

data.name: MemoryIndexStorageFailed
data.value: The local memory index could not be written. Close other operations using this memory and try again.
